title: Van Bommel appointed Belgium head coach
dek: Belgium appointed Mark van Bommel, 49-year-old former Netherlands captain, as head coach on a contract running through Euro 2028, effective 15 August 2026. Van Bommel arrives after guiding Royal Antwerp to the Belgian league title and cup honours.
author: The GoCheckMySports Desk
key_fact: Mark van Bommel, former Netherlands captain, has been appointed Belgium head coach on a contract running through Euro 2028, starting 15 August 2026.
bottom_line: Van Bommel begins his tenure on 15 August with Nations League matches immediately following. His opening run against Italy, France, and Turkey will be the first test of whether his domestic success at Antwerp translates to the international stage.
body: Belgium appointed Mark van Bommel, 49, as head coach on a contract running through Euro 2028, according to BBC Sport. Van Bommel will officially assume the role on 15 August 2026.
Van Bommel, a former Netherlands captain, succeeds Rudi Garcia. Garcia's departure was confirmed after Belgium's quarter-final exit to Spain at the 2026 World Cup, which Spain won.

Van Bommel most recently managed Royal Antwerp, where he guided the club to the Belgian league title, Belgian Cup, and Belgian Super Cup over a two-year spell. He will be assisted by Boudewijn Zenden, Maarten Martens, and Reinier Robbemond.

Van Bommel released a statement on his appointment. "It is a great honour to become head coach of Belgium," he said, per BBC Sport. "Belgium has outstanding players and enormous potential. Together with my coaching staff, we want to build a team that is disciplined, ambitious and brave enough to compete with the very best."

Belgian Football Association sporting director Vincent Mannaert said Van Bommel's "international experience as both a coach and player" would help the Red Devils "continue to improve, achieve results and reach their full potential", according to the BBC.
An early task for Van Bommel is to oversee Nations League fixtures against Italy, France, and Turkey across September and October 2026.
